summary.zh: FIA 从 2006 年起将引擎规则从 3.0 升 V10 收紧为 2.4 升 V8 并限制转速，意在控制成本与速度；2008 年强制使用统一电控单元，也终结了车队私下开发的驾驶辅助系统。
summary.en: From 2006 the FIA downsized the engine formula from 3.0-litre V10s to rev-limited 2.4-litre V8s to control cost and speed; a mandatory standard ECU from 2008 also ended teams' privately developed driver-aid systems for good.
